allow: Bash(docker run --rm docker-backend sh -c "ls /app/dist/ 2>&1 || echo DIST_EMPTY")
Bash(docker exec docker-backend-1 sh -c "npx ts-node --project prisma/tsconfig.seed.json prisma/seed.ts 2>&1 || npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts 2>&1")

Bash(docker exec docker-backend-1 sh -c "cd /app && node -e ""const{execSync}=require\(''child_process''\);execSync\(''npx ts-node --compiler-options \\""{\\\\\\""module\\\\\\"":\\\\\\""CommonJS\\\\\\""}\\"" prisma/seed.ts'',{stdio:''inherit''}\)"" 2>&1")
Bash(docker exec docker-backend-1 sh -c 'TS_NODE_COMPILER_OPTIONS=""{\\""module\\"":\\""CommonJS\\""}"" npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts')
Bash(npm install @nestjs/jwt @nestjs/passport passport passport-jwt passport-local bcrypt)
Bash(winpty env DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/simulador_examen" npx prisma migrate dev --name add_user_auth_fields)
Bash(docker exec docker-backend-1 sh -c "DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@postgres:5432/simulador_examen npx prisma migrate deploy 2>&1")

Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres simulador_examen -c "SELECT pg_advisory_unlock_all\(\); SELECT pg_terminate_backend\(pid\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE query LIKE ''%advisory%'' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid\(\);")
Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres simulador_examen -c "\\d ""User""")

Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres simulador_examen -c "INSERT INTO ""_prisma_migrations"" \(id, checksum, finished_at, migration_name, logs, rolled_back_at, started_at, applied_steps_count\) VALUES \(gen_random_uuid\(\)::text, ''manual'', NOW\(\), ''20240310000000_add_user_auth_fields'', NULL, NULL, NOW\(\), 1\) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;")
Bash(docker exec docker-backend-1 sh -c 'TS_NODE_COMPILER_OPTIONS=""{\\""module\\"":\\""commonjs\\""}"" npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts 2>&1')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/ > /dev/null 2>&1; echo ""exit: $?""')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/ 2>&1 | head -5')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/ > /dev/null 2>&1; echo $?')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'cat /proc/net/tcp 2>/dev/null | head -5; netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null; ps aux')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'wget -qO- http://localhost:3000/ 2>&1 | head -3')
Bash(docker exec docker-frontend-1 sh -c 'wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000/ 2>&1 | head -3')
Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres simulador_examen -c '\\d ""User""')

Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d simulador_examen -c "ALTER TABLE ""Exam"" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ""calculatorEnabled"" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true; ALTER TABLE ""Answer"" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ""isMarkedForReview"" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false; ALTER TABLE ""Answer"" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ""updatedAt"" TIMESTAMP\(3\) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;")
Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d simulador_examen -c "\\d ""Exam""")
Bash(docker exec docker-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d simulador_examen -c "\\d ""Answer""")
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --build backend frontend)
